ageGate.title: Age Verification
ageGate.text: To ensure we only communicate with adult tobacco consumers, please confirm you are 21 years of age or older.

home.ctaButton: I want to be a client
home.contactSubtitle: Or get in touch via WhatsApp:
home.feature1Desc: Active for two decades as a leading distributor in the state of Rio de Janeiro.
home.feature2Desc: Selected brands and high-quality domestic and imported products.
home.feature3Desc: Fast proprietary logistics and specialized support for your business.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Discover the story of dedication and success of LM Rocha Distribuidora
about.historyText1: Founded in 2006 in Rio de Janeiro, LM Rocha Distribuidora was born with the commitment to supply the market with the finest tobacco and cigar products. Over two decades, we have consolidated our presence through relationships of extreme trust, safety, and credibility with our clients.
about.historyText2: We always strive to innovate our portfolio, offering from the most traditional brands to the main national and imported novelties for high-quality tobacconists, convenience stores, and emporiums.

values.missionText: Distribute premium tobacco products with excellence, providing value to our commercial partners through agility, integrity, and a diverse portfolio.
values.visionText: To be recognized as the most trusted tobacco and cigar distributor in Southeastern Brazil, continuously expanding our presence and service quality.
values.valuesText: Commitment to the client, non-negotiable ethics, superior quality, fast logistics, and responsibility in commercializing products for adults.

brands.title: Our Brands
brands.subtitle: We work with the best and most respected brands in the tobacco sector
